text: There once was a lonely old man named Archibald. He loved birds. He loved watching them soar. He loved listening to their songs. And he loved dreaming. Archibald dreamed of flying. He dreamed of feathers. He dreamed of sky. One night he dreamed brightly. He dreamt he was a bird. He flew. He sang. He sang a song. He sang his heart out.
